remember: Students will be able to recall the essential elements and characteristics of a report.
Students will be able to identify the purpose and structure of a report.
Students will be able to list the key features of different types of reports.
understand: Students will be able to explain the importance of reports in professional and personal life.
Students will be able to comprehend the role of reports in decision-making and evaluation.
Students will be able to analyze the audience and purpose of a report.
apply: Students will be able to write a report on a given topic, incorporating essential elements and characteristics.
Students will be able to select and organize relevant information for a report.
Students will be able to use appropriate tone, language, and format in report writing.
analyze: Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of a report in conveying information and achieving its purpose.
Students will be able to identify the strengths and weaknesses of a report.
Students will be able to suggest improvements to a report.

ncert_objectives: To understand the purpose and structure of a report.
To learn the essential elements of a report and their functions.
To write a report on a given topic.
board_exam_objectives: To write a report on a given topic, incorporating essential elements and characteristics.
To demonstrate understanding of the purpose and structure of a report.
To evaluate the effectiveness of a report in conveying information and achieving its purpose.
